director.name: Sudhir Shrestha, Ph.D.
director.title: PI, Director — Intelligent Systems Lab
director.department: Department of Engineering and Computer Science
director.bio: Dr. Shrestha is a tenured professor in Engineering and Computer Science department at Sonoma State University. He founded the ISL in 2017 and has directed it since. His research spans biomedical sensing, intelligent robotics, and embedded AI systems. He holds a Ph.D. in Electrical and Micro/Nanoscale Systems Engineering from Louisiana Tech University and completed postdoctoral training at Purdue University in Indianapolis.
